content: ||ryker isnt N's rep tho, just one of the many unlucky souls that have a contract with him||
|| Where do they say they're the representative for the 3rd aeon, or the aeon avatar or whatever it is? ||
||i always considered them to be N’s representative, just an unwilling one, but fair enough. Ryker especially since he can also call upon N like what happened in Ch7||
||that was him exploiting a loophole in his "only N can kill him" contract by throwing himself on someone's else's blade so N was forced to save his furry ass||
ohh is that it? fair enough
thats why N was so pissed in the epilogue
Afaik N just appeared as a mysterious figure, they never mention them being tied to an aeon
the encyclopedia in the game archive also mentions it, although i dont blame anyone for not reading that
Huh, so we have to read the encyclopedia to understand what they're talking about in the story?
The major story plot should be explained in the story not on the extra texts 😅
not really. the aeons of rapture's identity is meant to be a half-mystery all the way up to ch8, so if you didn't catch it, you're just playing along to the writers intention
But going mid way through CH 8 and the characters talking like it's something we knew all along when it was never mentioned in the story is just dumb
If it's a mystery, that's another reason they should unveil it, not talk like we always knew that
<@702167871144591461> very important winkle lore hidden behind one-time only cutscene
"your leaders are just taller than everyone else?"
their bodies are much shorter to compensate
with how Little N treats N victims as ||N avatars||
i knew i had sound logic
if you retreat from a mission pandia gets a maso awakening (she enjoys losing)
As seen from her breeding frenzy
she has pretty impressive skincare and hair care
What if G-Winkle is just her in her worm form?
Light pls make it a reality and my life is yours
this event is actually crazy lore
the old events are so good
Good way to relive old Morimens
